brief_notes: Solid dense paper with five summary tables (classification, runtime, benchmark, generalization, Drosophila, optical). All numbers verified faithfully: 98.4% (SD 0.1), Golgi 1.83/0.44 n=10, iPSC 0.15Hz (SD 0.24) n=56, MF-GC 0.49/0.54Hz n=15, ASAP5 2.26/0.46 vs 4.79/0.74, recall/precision/F1 triples with Cohen's d 1.25/3.87/1.35/5.1, iGluSnFR3 n=1524 21.8/48.7ms. Discussion is brief but comprehensive.
